larainspect audit
=================
Host: demo-vps
Schema: v0alpha1
Generated: 2024-05-16 12:00:00Z
Duration: 1.25s
Result: critical risk (exit code 40)

Audit Summary
-------------
Findings: 3 total
Classes: direct=1 heuristic=1 compromise=1 unknowns=1
Severity: critical=1 high=1 medium=1 low=0 informational=0

Priority Queue
--------------
1. [CRITICAL][DIRECT] .env is writable by the web runtime
2. [HIGH][COMPROMISE] Unexpected PHP file in public uploads path
3. [UNKNOWN][PERMISSION_DENIED] Could not inspect the main Nginx config

Direct Findings (1)
-------------------
[CRITICAL][CONFIRMED] .env is writable by the web runtime (filesystem.permissions)
Class: direct finding
Why: A writable .env lets the runtime or an attacker change secrets and application behavior.
Affected:
- /var/www/shop/.env
Evidence:
- path: /var/www/shop/.env
- mode: 0664
Remediation: Set .env ownership to the deploy user and remove runtime write access.
Controls:
- laravel.env-integrity-and-permissions [implemented]: Laravel environment files stay private, non-runtime-owned, and within the intended deployment boundary

Heuristic Findings (1)
----------------------
[MEDIUM][POSSIBLE] APP_DEBUG appears to be enabled (source.config)
Class: heuristic finding
Why: Verbose exception output can expose stack traces, paths, and secrets.
Affected:
- /var/www/shop/.env
Evidence:
- env: APP_DEBUG=true
Remediation: Verify production environment variables and cached config values.
Controls:
- php.runtime-debug-and-diagnostic-exposure [partial]: Production Laravel and PHP deployments avoid debug and diagnostic exposure

Possible Compromise Indicators (1)
----------------------------------
[HIGH][PROBABLE] Unexpected PHP file in public uploads path (nginx.boundaries)
Class: possible compromise indicator
Why: Executable PHP in an upload path can indicate a dropped webshell or an unsafe execution boundary.
Affected:
- /var/www/shop/public/uploads/cache.php
Evidence:
- path: /var/www/shop/public/uploads/cache.php
Remediation: Remove executable handling from upload paths and investigate file provenance.
Controls:
- uploads.no-public-php-execution [implemented]: Upload and storage-adjacent public paths never execute PHP

Unknowns (1)
------------
[PERMISSION_DENIED] Could not inspect the main Nginx config (nginx.main_config)
Reason: Permission denied while reading /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.
Affected:
- /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
